summary: Journey Card and Email Modal Interaction - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified hero card 'Send to coach' button opens email modal pre-filled with auto-generated subject and message body. 'Tap to edit' functionality works correctly, and edited messages are properly passed to the modal. Floating action bar Email button correctly opens modal WITHOUT pre-fill. Modal state resets properly between different open sources.
critical_code_review_comments: PrimaryHeroCard.js: Correctly implements editedMessage state and textareaRef for editable message functionality
PrimaryHeroCard.js: CTA click handler properly passes { subject, body } with editedMessage taking precedence over suggestedMessage
heroOrchestrator.js: buildSubject() function correctly generates context-aware subject lines (e.g., 'Following up — Marcus Johnson')
heroOrchestrator.js: Coach tasks include suggestedSubject field populated by buildSubject()
JourneyPage.js: openGatedEmail(prefill) correctly accepts optional { subject, body } and sets emailInitial state
JourneyPage.js: closeAll() properly resets emailInitial to {} ensuring clean state
EmailComposer.js: Correctly initializes subject and body state from initialSubject and initialBody props
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey Card and Email Modal interaction fully tested in iteration 248. All features working: (1) Hero card 'Send to coach' opens modal with pre-filled subject 'Following up — Marcus Johnson' and suggested message body, (2) 'Tap to edit' shows textarea and allows editing, (3) Edited message is passed to modal instead of original, (4) Floating action bar Email button opens clean modal without pre-fill, (5) Modal state resets properly when closing and reopening, (6) AI Draft section with Generate button is present and accessible, (7) Subject and body can be manually edited in modal. Note: 'To' dropdown is empty because no coaches are added to this program's contacts - this is expected existing behavior.

hero_card_displays.details: Hero card found with title 'Check in with Marcus about Michigan visit follow-up'

suggested_message_block.details: Message to coach block displays with suggested message

tap_to_edit_functionality.details: 'Tap to edit' button found, clicking shows textarea editor (data-testid='hero-message-editor')

edited_message_passed_to_modal.details: Edited message 'This is my edited test message for the coach.' was correctly passed to modal body

subject_auto_generated.details: Subject auto-filled with 'Following up — Marcus Johnson' based on task type and athlete name

body_pre_filled.details: Body pre-filled with suggested message from hero card

floating_bar_no_prefill.details: Floating action bar Email button opens modal with empty subject and body

modal_state_reset.details: Closing modal and reopening from different source correctly resets/applies appropriate state

ai_draft_button_present.details: AI Generate button found in modal (data-testid='ai-generate-btn')

manual_editing_in_modal.details: Subject and body can be manually edited after pre-fill

send_profile_feature.details: Send Profile button not found - no coaches added to this program's contacts (expected per agent context)

to_dropdown_behavior.details: 'To' dropdown is empty (only placeholder option) - no coaches added to program contacts (expected per agent context)

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked per agent context
